violations.text: Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored on the same shelf as ready to eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Seafood case door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the window ledge have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Molluscan Shellfish tags are not maintained for 90 days. Molluscan shellfish tags or labels are required to be maintained for 90 calendar days from the date the container is emptied. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Molluscan Shellfish located in the display case did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags did not have the date when the last shellfish was used. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Self-serve soup and chili ingredient information was not readily available to the consumer. Self-serve food ingredient information must be readily available to the consumer. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The condensate from the expresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
The condensate from the ice machine is draining outside into the soil. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

The ice machine in the basement and in the seafood area are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The floor in the ware-washing area is in poor repair. Tiles are missing and floor needs to be regrouted. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

The floor in the basement where the ice machine is, is constructed of dirt which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, food storage areas, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as beverages during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

A loaf of bread packaged in the food establishment is lacking a label. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Loaf of bread was removed from the shelf and must not be sold on the shelf until it has label information. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as milk during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. A new sanitizing solution was mixed to 50 ppm during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Items listed below, packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from shelf and must not sold until required information is placed on label. Items: Chicken, chicken noodle soup, bean soup, crab cakes, raisin cookies, chocolate chip cookies, bread crumbs, crostini, croutons. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The tile in the deli area is in poor repair (lacking grout). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Embargoed food (items listed below) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Embargoed food from previous inspection was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Per person in charge, establishment will no longer sell mislabeled food products. Items: kale & brussels sprout salad, chicken dinner, chicken parmesan, blue cheese spinach salad, asparagus soup, lobster bisque, New England clam chowder, chopped quahogs, and fish stock. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The deli prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per person in charge, a handwashing sink will be installed next to the prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

Food was observed held at 43-46 degrees Fahrenheit in the deli display case. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Meatballs and pepperoni were disposed of during time of inspection (see disposal form). All other items were relocated to the walk-in cooler. The ambient air temperature of the deli display case was observed at 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Deli display case was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Deli display case must be repaired/adjusted/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The items listed below that are packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information (ingredients, quantity, allergen disclosure, and manufactures information). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. All items were embargoed (see embargo form) and must not be used until products have required label information and when approval is granted. Items: Blue cheese spinach salad, kale & Brussel sprout salad, grilled chicken dinner, chicken parmesan, asparagus soup, lobster bisque, New England clam chowder, chopped quahogs, and raw quahog juice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The walls and ceiling in the bathroom are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The floors in the deli prep area are constructed of wood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
